review.notes: OCR cuts off mid-sentence ("The Sockeyes begin the final") — the full article likely continues on another page/column, but the visible content is accurately summarized. Draft correctly identifies headline, byline, key players (Jim Gunn, Glenn Pencer), and owner Bruce Taylor's two-year BCJHL final-loss backstory. Note: the draft says "BCJHL championship" in the short but the OCR says they won the western junior A championship (Abbott Cup path), not just the BCJHL — however this is a minor nuance and not strictly wrong given context. Overall the draft is faithful to the OCR.
